input.question: Show students count by department and current semester

payload.question: Show students count by department and current semester

output.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  current_semester AS semester,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
GROUP BY department, current_semester
ORDER BY student_count DESC;

visualization.title: Students count by department and current semester
visualization.description: Bar chart showing number of students per department, broken down by current semester.

payload.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  current_semester AS semester,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
GROUP BY department, current_semester
ORDER BY student_count DESC;
